zh.lifeSummary: Robert de Burghersh 1st Baron Burghersh是Sir Reynold de Burghersh的兒子，於1266年出生在英國素可。他和Margaret Maud de Badlesmere至少有4個兒子。他於1299年被列為lord warden of the cinque ports 。他去世於1306年7月2日在英國英格蘭享年40歲，埋葬在英國林可爾史爾林肯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Robert de Burghersh 1st Baron Burghersh是Sir Reynold de Burghersh的儿子，于1266年出生在英国素可。他和Margaret Maud de Badlesmere至少有4个儿子。他于1299年被列为lord warden of the cinque ports 。他去世于1306年7月2日在英国英格兰享年40岁，埋葬在英国林可爾史爾林肯。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: Robert de Burghersh 1st Baron Burghersh was born in 1266, in Sussex, England as the son of Sir Reynold de Burghersh. He had at least 4 sons with Margaret Maud de Badlesmere. In 1299, at the age of 33, his occupation is listed as lord warden of the cinque ports . He died on 2 July 1306, in England, United Kingdom, at the age of 40, and was buried in Lincoln, Lincolnshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Robert de Burghersh 1st Baron Burghersh est né en 1266, à Sussex, Angleterre, fils de Sir Reynold de Burghersh. Il a eu au moins 4 fils avec Margaret Maud de Badlesmere. En 1299, à l’âge de 33 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est lord warden of the cinque ports . Il est décédé le 2 juillet 1306, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 40 ans, et a été enterré à Lincoln, Lincolnshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Robert de Burghersh 1st Baron Burghersh wurde 1266 in Sussex, England, als Sohn von Sir Reynold de Burghersh geboren. Er hatte mit Margaret Maud de Badlesmere mindestens 4 Söhne. 1299, als er 33 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als lord warden of the cinque ports  aufgeführt. Er starb am 2. Juli 1306 im Alter von 40 Jahren in England, United Kingdom und wurde in Lincoln, Lincolnshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Robert de Burghersh 1st Baron Burghersh è nato il nel 1266 nel Sussex, England come figlio di Sir Reynold de Burghersh. Lui avuto almeno 4 figli con Margaret Maud de Badlesmere. Nel 1299, all'età di 33 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come lord warden of the cinque ports . Morì il 2 luglio 1306, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 40 anni, e fu sepolto a Lincoln, Lincolnshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert de Burghersh 1st Baron Burghershは1266年にイギリススセックスでSir Reynold de Burghershの息子として生まれた。彼はMargaret Maud de Badlesmereとの間に少なくとも4人の息子をもうけた。1299年，33歳の時，職業はlord warden of the cinque ports と記録されている。彼は1306年7月2日にイギリスイギリスで40歳で死去し，イギリスリンコルンシュアイアリンコルンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert de Burghersh 1st Baron Burghersh(은)는 1266년 영국 수세스에서 Sir Reynold de Burghersh의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 Margaret Maud de Badlesmere(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 1299년, 33세의 나이로 그의 직업은 lord warden of the cinque ports 이었다. 그는 1306년 7월 2일 영국 잉글랜드에서 40세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 링코실르 링코컨에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Robert de Burghersh 1st Baron Burghersh nasceu em 1266, em Sussex, Inglaterra filho de Sir Reynold de Burghersh. Ele teve pelo menos 4 filhos com Margaret Maud de Badlesmere. Em 1299, com 33 anos, sua profissão aparece como lord warden of the cinque ports . Ele faleceu em 2 de julho de 1306, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 40 anos, e foi sepultado em Lincoln, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Robert de Burghersh 1st Baron Burghersh родился в 1266 г. в местности суссекс, Англия. Его отца звали Sir Reynold de Burghersh. У него было по крайней мере 4 сына от Margaret Maud de Badlesmere. В 1299 году, в возрасте 33 лет,  он работал по профессии lord warden of the cinque ports . Он умер 2 июля 1306 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 40 лет и был похоронен в местности линколн, линколншир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Robert de Burghersh 1st Baron Burghersh nació en 1266, en Sussex, Inglaterra como hijo de Sir Reynold de Burghersh. Tuvo por lo menos 4 hijos con Margaret Maud de Badlesmere. En 1299, a la edad de 33 años, su ocupación registrada era lord warden of the cinque ports . Murió el 2 de julio de 1306, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 40 años, y fue sepultado en Lincoln, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra.
